description: Returns a list of all Meetings for a specified Project.

parameters.name: deleted_only
parameters.description: Indicates whether to only show deleted meetings. When this query parameter is passed the response body will be an array of meetings without grouping. i.e. { "meetings":[{Meeting_1}, {Meeting_2}] }

parameters.name: filters[assignee_id]
parameters.description: Returns meeting(s) with the specified assignee

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Returns meeting(s) with the specified ID(s)

parameters.name: serializer_view
parameters.description:
The data set that should be returned from the serializer.
The normal view includes default fields.
The extended view includes the default fields plus Meeting Template fields.
Default view is normal.
